hero.description: Aquanubandh takes the guesswork out of Vannamei farming. Track your daily feed, monitor water quality, and predict harvests perfectly from one simple app.
workflow.title: Farming made effortless.
workflow.step1.title: Log your stock
workflow.step1.desc: Enter your initial PL count and setup details to kick off a new cycle.
workflow.step2.title: Record daily feed
workflow.step2.desc: Tap in your morning, noon, and evening feed data in just a few seconds.
workflow.step3.title: Watch profits grow
workflow.step3.desc: We instantly calculate your biomass, FCR, and survival rates automatically.
upgrade.desc: Stop losing money to bad math and lost paper. Go fully digital to keep your farm data safe and accurate.
features.card1.title: Multi-pond dashboard
features.card1.desc: Manage unlimited farms and ponds from a single screen. Know the exact health of your entire operation instantly.
features.card2.title: 4-session feed tracking
features.card2.desc: Log your daily feed across all four sessions in seconds. Make sure you never miss a vital growth window.
features.card3.title: Auto KPI calculation
features.card3.desc: Let the app do the math. Your biomass, FCR, survival rate, and daily growth are calculated the second you enter data.
features.card4.title: Live market prices
features.card4.desc: See real-time Vannamei prices by count grade directly inside the app. Time your harvest perfectly for maximum profit.
team.desc: Give your workers, supervisors, and accountants the exact access they need to do their jobs well. Keep everyone on the same page without the confusion.
blog.title: Learn to maximize your yield.
blog.card1.title: How Ramesh dropped his FCR by 12% in one cycle
blog.card1.desc: Find out exactly what feeding adjustments saved this AP farmer ₹2 Lakhs in just a few months.
blog.card2.title: The complete guide to Vannamei partial harvests
blog.card2.desc: Learn exactly when to harvest, how to recalculate your biomass, and how to maximize your mid-cycle cash flow.
blog.card3.title: Understanding live market price fluctuations
blog.card3.desc: Discover why prices drop at 40C and learn how to time your harvest perfectly using your app data.
cta.title: Stop guessing. Start growing.
cta.desc: Your old paper register is costing you money. Download Aquanubandh today and start running your most profitable cycle yet.
footer: © 2025 Aquanubandh • Built for Indian Vannamei farmers
